overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player moves from under an elevated highway past futuristic billboards, across busy intersections with pedestrians and vehicles, and descends to a lower urban plaza.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway structure past the large billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement showing police officers with NEW HERO text
massive concrete overpass with support beams overhead
corroded steel support column with red and white stripes
scattered garbage and cardboard boxes accumulated on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in the rain, passing a prominent NEW HERO police billboard on the right. The area is sheltered from the rain with wet reflective concrete underfoot, and the scene is lit by artificial streetlights and neon glow from nearby buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban intersection with digital signage

events.description: exits covered area under overpass into open rainy intersection
begins crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet intersection toward the neon-lit buildings on the far side

notable_agents.action: walking with black umbrella across the crosswalk

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white CRESCENT text
towering futuristic buildings with illuminated windows rising in the distance
large glowing billboards displaying animated advertisements
bright yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into an open intersection exposed to the heavy rain. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk while pedestrians with umbrellas walk in opposing directions, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and bright digital billboards illuminating the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with zebra crossings and advertisements

events.description: white van and other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing through the intersection alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: tall red metal box with illuminated walk signal display
large pink and purple neon sign with Japanese text TENGU
tall structure with multiple stacked advertising screens

segments.scene_description: Moving through the center of the wide intersection surrounded by heavy rain and neon reflections on the wet asphalt. Vehicles including a white van navigate the crossing while the TENGU neon sign glows prominently in the distance, and digital billboards tower overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairs to lower urban plaza

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs to lower plaza level
transitions from street level to lower covered plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking down wet concrete stairs toward the lower plaza level

entered.detail: wet concrete stairway with red painted edges leading downward
thick orange support pillar with black and yellow warning stripes
sunken open area with scattered structures and neon lighting below
small building with illuminated windows at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Descending a wide concrete stairway away from the street level into a lower urban plaza. The area becomes more sheltered from the rain, with an orange structural pillar marking the transition. The view opens toward a sunken plaza with transit structures and continued neon illumination reflecting off the wet surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered underbelly of a highway into a rain-drenched urban intersection before descending into a sunken plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated structure, passing a New Hero police billboard over wet, reflective concrete lit by artificial neon. As the camera emerges from the overpass, the environment opens into a heavy downpour where the view expands across a yellow-striped crosswalk crowded with pedestrians and towering glass skyscrapers. The movement continues through the center of the wide intersection, navigating past vehicles and the glow of a distant Tengu sign amidst shimmering asphalt reflections. Finally, the scene shifts as the camera descends a wide concrete stairway past an orange structural pillar, moving away from the street level into a sheltered lower plaza filled with transit structures.
